title: Only Hammers And Excavators
description: A simple mod that adds various type of hammers & excavators, that mine 3x1 area
body:
<center>

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

# **Only Hammers And Excavators**  
**Only Hammers And Excavators** adds a large variety of **hammers and excavators** that can mine a **3x3 area**, making mining and digging much faster and more efficient.  

</center>

---

## ⚒️ Tools  
- All tools are based on **vanilla materials** (from **Wood** to **Netherite**).  
- **Hammers** break blocks in a 3x1 area (like pickaxes).  
- **Excavators** dig dirt, sand, gravel, and similar blocks in a 3x1 area (like shovel).  
- If you **sneak (Shift)** while using them, they will **break only 1 block** instead of the 3x1 area.  

---

## 🔗 Combined Mods  
This mod combines the features of:  
- [Only Hammers](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/only-hammers)  
- [Only Excavators](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/only-excavators)  

---

## ⚙️ Customization  
The mod comes with **config files** that allow you to:  
- Change **durability** values of all tools.  
- Adjust the **mining radius** (default: 3x1).  

This makes the tools highly customizable to fit your gameplay style.  

---

## 📌 Compatibility & Versions  
- **Actively supported versions:** Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21 and later
